notes: Verified 2026-05-14. ex-HDFC Focused 30 Fund. Carries expense ratio, exit load, min SIP, riskometer, benchmark; links to SID, KIM and factsheet.

title: HDFC Mutual Fund — Fund Factsheets
notes: Verified 2026-05-14. Monthly consolidated factsheet; latest per Mid-Cap scheme page is dated 26-Apr-2026. Phase 2 resolves the current PDF link from here.

title: HDFC Mutual Fund — Fund Documents (KIM / SID / Scheme Summary)
notes: Verified 2026-05-14. Has KIM, SID and Scheme Summary tabs; lists per-scheme PDFs (current KIMs dated 21-Nov-2025). Phase 2 resolves per-scheme KIM/SID PDFs from here.

title: HDFC Large Cap Fund — Scheme Information Document
notes: Dated SID PDF (30-May-2025). Phase 2 should re-check the KIM/SID hub for a newer version before snapshotting.

title: HDFC Large Cap Fund — Key Information Memorandum
notes: Dated KIM PDF (30-May-2025). Phase 2 should re-check the KIM/SID hub for a newer version before snapshotting.

title: HDFC Mutual Fund — Total Expense Ratio of Mutual Fund Schemes
notes: Verified 2026-05-14. Links to the monthly TER report (latest: May 2026) with per-scheme expense ratios. Authoritative source for expense-ratio facts.

title: HDFC Mutual Fund — Statutory Disclosures
notes: Parent statutory-disclosure index (TER, valuation policy, portfolios, addenda).

title: HDFC Mutual Fund — Investor FAQs (General)
notes: Verified 2026-05-14. Covers KYC/CKYC, SIP, redemptions, account statements, nominee, demat units, NRI/minor investing.

title: HDFC Mutual Fund — Download Consolidated Account Statement
notes: Verified 2026-05-14. Explains PAN-based vs folio-based statements and the OTP-based download flow; free of charge.

title: HDFC Mutual Fund — Request Statement
notes: Channels to request statements (call centre, SMS, ISC, email Smart Account Statement).

title: HDFC Mutual Fund — How to Get a Capital Gain Statement
notes: HDFC's own (first-party) educational guide on obtaining a capital-gains statement — not a third-party blog.

title: AMFI — Risk-o-Meter
notes: Industry reference for what the riskometer means and its risk bands.

title: AMFI — Introduction to Mutual Funds
notes: Definitions (NAV, scheme types, SIP). Good educational link for refusal responses.

title: AMFI — Investor Corner
notes: AMFI investor education hub; default educational link for advisory-query refusals.

title: SEBI Investor — Understanding the Riskometer
notes: SEBI investor-education explanation of the riskometer's five risk bands.

title: SEBI — FAQs for Mutual Fund Investors
notes: SEBI's official FAQ PDF for mutual fund investors (Sep 2024).

title: SEBI Circular — Disclosure of Risk-o-meter, Benchmark and Portfolio
notes: Regulatory basis for riskometer and benchmark disclosure to investors.
